quiz.question:
White's queen and bishop have a battery aiming at the h6-pawn. 

Is Bxh6 a good sacrifice?

answers.text: No, in this particular scenario it achieves nothing.

feedback.text: After Bxh6, Black does not have to recapture. ...Bxb4 is a fork from Black. White does not have an attack.

distractors.text: Yes! All conditions are met for the sacrifice!

feedback.text: Are you sure? You can't get more pieces into the attack quickly, and you have other problems.

distractors.text: It is good, but not all conditions are met for the sacrifice (like getting more pieces into the attack).

feedback.text: Not all conditions are met for the sacrifice, this is true, but it isn't good because Black has another response.
